channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: steamworks
item.description: Steamworks adds late‑game steam power: boilers, engines, pumps, pipes, and a powered sawmill.

item.title: Falx To War Axe
item.description: Falx not cutting hard enough, try a hefty War Axe instead.

item.title: Apotheosis Tweak - Fantasy Creature Balance
item.description: Balance tweaks to Fantasy Creatures Reborn

item.title: Clothes have Pockets
item.description: Adds inventory slots when wearing certain clothing

item.title: In Dappled Groves Firewood Buff Continued
item.description: Adjusts some of In Dappled Groves' recipes

item.title: Kobold Player Model Redux
item.description: A complete 1.21+ remake of Soi's Kobold player model, for PlayerModelLib by Maltiez!

item.title: Daubweave
item.description: A simple patch to buff daub output, and adds an alternative to craft daub blocks!

item.title: fish(wastaken) Classes Patch
item.description: small personal patch for GlooMeClasses. Requires Rustbound Magic as well

item.title: Charlotte & Tassa's clothes
item.description: This mod add clothes in the game.

item.title: Ecosystem - Flora
item.description: Making flora living

item.title: Dame Elswyth’s Summons
item.description: Find and summon lost pets. Fixes PetAI fire avoidance AI task for tamed pets.

item.title: Secure Cooking Pots
item.description: No more lost liquids while cooking. You'll get burnt if you try.

item.title: RKN Generic Crafting
item.description: Generic gridless crafting system that completely replaces all UI grid recipes

item.title: Murlok Vintage Server Patch
item.description: Collection of tweaks for the Murlok server and playthrough.

item.title: lhgui
item.description: GUI mod for lasthearth server

item.title: Riftworks
item.description: Interesting and useful lategame items and machines

item.title: Starless Skies
item.description: Removes the sun, moon, and sky, and changes shaders to cause absolute darkness

item.title: Healing Sleep
item.description: Replaces fast-forward with a configurable heal over time while sleeping.

item.title: The Crown & The Coalition Server Tweaks
item.description: Server tweaks for The Crown & The Coalition.

item.title: Extreme Weathers [ALPHA]
item.description: Introduces new weather mechanics using the vanilla weather system.

item.title: Julz Addons
item.description: A smol mod made for my mates to have fun in VS

item.title: Rabbit Taming
item.description: Have your fluffy friends as pets. Hares are now tamable and become Bunnies. Requires Pet Ai.

item.title: Speed Sleep
item.description: The more players that are sleeping, the faster time passes. 100% of players asleep = vanilla

item.title: C&N Jewelry
item.description: Rough/cut gems/jewelry and encrusting in the armor/tools with buffs

item.title: Window Storage Lib - Transform Patches
item.description: Patches mods to to make them look better in mods that use Window Storage Lib slots

item.title: Freshness Overlay
item.description: Shows freshness of food and hides.

item.title: DWC Classes
item.description: Custom classes for DWC's private server.

item.title: Vintage Story Chinese Language Pack
item.description: Vintage Story Chinese Language Pack（复古物语模组汉化包）

item.title: Metal Ladders
item.description: Adds metal ladders

item.title: Automated Server Messages
item.description: Admins can set recurring server-wide messages everybody can see.
